text.title: audience-segmentation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for audience-segmentation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using demographic segments alone for messaging work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Demographics consistently underperform behavior-and-needs segments for messaging because they capture who someone is, not what they need or do. Age 25-34 tells you nothing about their workflow or pain intensity.

failure-mode.description: Agent produces segment profiles with no CRM ID, transcript filename, or analytics row as citation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents invent plausible personas that do not exist in the data. Mitigation: require row-citations (CRM ID or transcript filename) for every claim; reject segments with zero citations.

failure-mode.description: Agent picks "innovative" unmeasurable dimensions like "growth mindset" or "digital native".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unmeasurable dimensions cannot be used to classify real customers or build targeted campaigns. Constrain dimensions to a whitelist tied to data sources you actually have.

failure-mode.description: Agent assigns 3-4 scores on every criterion for every segment, producing a flat ranking table.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Regression to the mean is the default LLM behaviour when criteria are open-ended. Mitigation: force rank-ordering before scoring, and require evidence-or-"unknown" per criterion.

failure-mode.description: Accepting segment size estimates from a single source (e.g. LinkedIn filter count) without a second independent estimate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Top-down market sizing sources compound error. Validate with at least one bottom-up count (CRM rows, analytics cohort, interview N) and flag 3x+ disagreements.

failure-mode.description: Agent produces one fictional person (Newsletter Nate) instead of a sized cluster (N=2,400, 18% of base).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A persona is a representative individual; a segment is a sized group. Do not use persona docs for ad targeting. Require "n=" and "% of base" on every segment output.

failure-mode.description: All input transcripts are from one quarter, producing segments that over-fit to a seasonal or recency-biased cohort.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Static segmentation from a single time window misses churn patterns and market shifts. Stratify input data over at least 2 quarters before clustering.
